fn read_with_errno(fd: libc::c_int, buf: &mut [u8]) -> Result<isize, std::io::Error> {
    let result = unsafe { libc::read(fd, buf.as_mut_ptr() as *mut libc::c_void, buf.len()) };
    if result == -1 {
        let err = std::io::Error::last_os_error();
        return Err(err);
    }
    Ok(result)
}
